talks.title: Design, then exist: The mantra of API-First development
talks.description: Learn to design contracts before code with API-First, optimizing collaboration and the development of strategic digital products.

talks.title: Webinar: Style Guides with Spectral
talks.description: A session focused on creating and implementing API style guides using Spectral, ensuring consistency and quality in OpenAPI contract design.

talks.title: APIs and Data Spaces: The Future of Data Sovereignty
talks.description: Exploration of the role of APIs in creating shared data spaces, focusing on interoperability, security, and data sovereignty across different industries.
